title: Mohammad Reza I of Iran becomes shah
fact: Mohammad Reza Pahlavi was the last Shah of Iran from 1941 to 1979.

title: Reza Shah becomes shah
fact: Reza Shah Pahlavi was Shah of Iran from 1925 to 1941 and founder of the Pahlavi dynasty.

title: Ahmad Shah Qajar becomes shah
fact: Ahmad Shah Qajar was the shah of Iran (Persia) from 16 July 1909 to 15 December 1925, and the seventh and final ruling member of the Qajar dynasty.

title: Nader Shah becomes shah
fact: Nader Shah Afshar was the founder of the Afsharid dynasty of Iran and one of the most powerful rulers in Iranian history, ruling as the emperor of Iran (Persia) from 1736 to 1747, when he was assassinated during a rebellion.

title: Naser al-Din Shah Qajar becomes shah
fact: Naser al-Din Shah Qajar was the fourth Shah of Qajar Iran from 5 September 1848 to 1 May 1896 when he was assassinated.

title: Agha Mohammad Khan Qajar becomes shah
fact: Agha Mohammad Khan Qajar, also known by his regnal name of Agha Mohammad Shah, was the founder of the Qajar dynasty of Iran, ruling as Shah from 1789 to 1797.

title: Mohammad Ali Shah Qajar becomes shah
fact: Mohammad Ali Shah Qajar was the sixth shah of the Qajar dynasty and remained the Shah of Iran from 8 January 1907 until being deposed on 16 July 1909.

title: Mozaffar ad-Din Shah Qajar becomes shah
fact: Mozaffar ad-Din Shah Qajar was the fifth Qajar shah of Iran, reigning from 1896 until his death in 1907.

title: Fath-Ali Shah Qajar becomes shah
fact: Fath-Ali Shah Qajar was the second Shah of Qajar Iran.

title: Mohammad Shah Qajar becomes shah
fact: Mohammad Shah Qajar was the third Qajar shah of Iran from 1834 to 1848, inheriting the throne from his grandfather, Fath-Ali Shah.

title: Darius III becomes shah
fact: Darius III was the thirteenth and last Achaemenid King of Kings of Persia, reigning from 336 BC to his death in 330 BC.

title: Lotf Ali Khan becomes shah
fact: Lotf Ali Khan was the last ruler of Iran from the Zand dynasty, ruling from 1789 to 1794.

title: Karim Khan zand becomes shah
fact: Mohammad Karim Khan Zand was the founder of the Zand dynasty, ruling all of Iran (Persia) except for Khorasan from 1751 to 1779.

title: Shahrukh Afshar becomes shah
fact: Shahrokh Mirza, better known by his dynastic title of Shahrokh Shah, was the Afsharid king (shah) of the western part of Khorasan from 1748 to 1796, with a two-month interruption.

title: Jafar Khan becomes shah
fact: Jafar Khan Zand, was the sixth shah (king) of the Zand dynasty of Iran from 1785 to 1789.

title: Ali Murad Khan becomes shah
fact: Ali-Morad Khan Zand was fifth ruler of the Zand dynasty of Iran, ruling from 15 March 1781, until 11 February 1785.

title: Sadiq Khan Zand becomes shah
fact: Sadeq Khan Zand, also known as Mohammad Sadeq, was the fourth Shah of the Zand dynasty of Iran from 22 August 1779 until 14 March 1781.

title: Sayed Murad Khan becomes shah
fact: Seyd Morad Khan, was the shah of Iran who reigned for about four months from January 23, 1789 until May 10, 1789.

title: Adil Shah becomes shah
fact: Ali-qoli Khan, commonly known by his regnal title Adel Shah was the second shah of Afsharid Iran, ruling from 1747 to 1748.

title: Mahmud Hotaki becomes shah
fact: Shāh Mahmūd Hotak, or Shāh Mahmūd Ghiljī, also known by his epithet, The Conqueror, was the ruler of the Hotak dynasty who overthrew the Safavid dynasty to become the king of Persia from 1722 until his death in 1725.

title: Ashraf Hotaki becomes shah
fact: Shah Ashraf Hotak, also known as Shah Ashraf Ghilji or Ghilzay, was an Afghan ruler who reigned as Shah of Iran from 1725 to 1729.

title: Ibrahim Afshar becomes shah
fact: Ebrahim Shah was the Afsharid shah of parts of Iran from 1748 to 1749.

title: Suleiman II of Persia becomes shah
fact: Mir Sayyed Muhammad Marashi, better known by his dynastic name of Suleiman II, was a Safavid pretender who managed to briefly become ruler of some parts of Iran from 1749 to 1750.

title: Jahan Shah becomes shah
fact: Muzaffar al-Din Jahan Shah ibn Yusuf, also known as Abu al-Muzaffar Jahan Shah or Jihan Shah, was the leader of the Qara Qoyunlu tribal confederacy from 1438 to 1467.
